author: Vincent Voyer
subject: docs(review): Full review and fixes on docs (algolia/react-instantsearch#1975)
body:
* docs(review): Full review and fixes on docs

- Added required information on props
- Added requirements for widgets, fixes algolia/react-instantsearch#1852
- Added guide on operations counting, fixes algolia/react-instantsearch#1861
- Changed style of Edit this page button
- Tweaked anchors to fix them again
- Applied feedback from Raymond, fixes algolia/react-instantsearch#1735
- Removed and cleaned many deprecated code/examples

* remove searchParameters= usage everywhere

* update operations guide

* fix editThisPage link

* fix bad import
